comment: 52yo male cabinetmaker, 25 years bespoke furniture workshop (oak/walnut/mahogany hardwood dust exposure, pre-2010s dust-extraction era), no current malignancy. Hardwood dust is IARC Group 1 (Monograph 100C); sinonasal adenocarcinoma latency 30-40y. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-OCC-WOOD-LEATHER-DUST-PREVENTION-INTENSIFIED-SURVEILLANCE (annual ENT consult + symptom-review for unilateral nasal obstruction/epistaxis/anosmia + low-threshold CT sinus + PPE counseling); alternative = IND-OCC-WOOD-LEATHER-DUST-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION. Validates v0.3 RF-OCC-WOOD-LEATHER-DUST-PREVENTION pilot (sinonasal adenocarcinoma risk).
